title: H2A MCP Manifest
description: Meta-schema for an H2A manifest: the per-(org x surface) declaration of which contracts, which methods of each, and which binding version are live. The manifest's declared methods are the single source of truth for what is callable; a method the manifest omits never appears to the agent. Lives at org/<org>/<surface>/manifest.json. Part of H2A spec version 1.0.

org.description: Org identifier. Must match the org folder name under org/.

surface.description: Interaction surface. Must match the surface folder name and be a member of the surface vocabulary.

version.description: Manifest version. Bumps when declared support changes or a contract/binding pin is re-pinned.

entryPoint.description: Surface entry point: a domain for www, a bundle/app id for app, a base URL for rest.

contracts.description: The categories this org exposes on this surface, each pinned to an exact contract version and an exact binding version.

id.description: Contract category id. Resolves to contract/<id>@<version>.json.

version.description: Exact pinned contract version. Must equal the binding's satisfiesContract. Pins are exact, never ranges; nothing auto-upgrades.

binding.description: Exact binding version to load. Resolves to org/<org>/<surface>/<id>@<binding>.json. Free to move under a fixed contract version.

methods.description: The subset of the contract's methods that are live on this surface. Must be a subset of the contract's methods and include the contract's required core. Becomes the callable tool list.
